Tc_exp_note: Ambient pressure, optimally doped. LOWER than Hg1223 (134 K) and Hg1234 (126 K). Range 100-108 K in literature. [UNVERIFIED - training data]
Tc_exp_source: Antipov et al. 1993; Tokiwa et al. Physica C 2005; Mukuda et al. JPSJ 2012
AF_inner_plane_note: NMR evidence (Mukuda et al., JPSJ 2012) indicates 3 inner planes in 5-layer cuprate develop antiferromagnetic order. Our nspin=1 calculation is for the paramagnetic state only.

comparison_with_hg1223.note: c increases by ~6.3 A from Hg1223 (two additional CuO2-Ca blocks)

comparison_with_hg1234.note: One more CuO2-Ca block added; Tc drops further

exp_source: Antipov et al. 1993; Tokiwa et al. 2005; Mukuda et al. JPSJ 2012
exp_note: [UNVERIFIED - training data] Lattice parameters from XRD; Tc from resistivity and susceptibility
data_source_note: PBEsol expected values estimated from published data and Hg1223/Hg1234 progression. NOT actual QE output.
